summary: Jq program (lines 31–52) lacks inline comments explaining cartesian product, exclude filter, and include append logic. Test harness embedded in workflow YAML (lines 34–63) is verbose; should be extracted. Good shell practices: set -euo pipefail, quoted variables, meaningful error messages, proper exit codes (0/2/3). Logic is sound but maintainability hurt by monolithic jq and fragile YAML-based test iteration.
